overall.description: First-person exploration of a fantasy wizarding common room (Hufflepuff) with distinctive round hobbit-style doors and warm wooden interiors. The player enters a circular dormitory bedroom, observes the furnished space including a figure near a mirror, and exits through corridors featuring stone and wood architecture with decorative plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor with round doors and stained glass

events.description: approaching the large round wooden door with metal scrollwork
opening the round door to enter the bedroom space

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor with red carpet, approaching and opening the ornate round door

entered.detail: large circular door with intricate metal scrollwork and stained glass side panels
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange light
wooden bench with intricate floral carvings along the corridor wall
decorative red patterned carpet running along the wooden floor
intricately carved wooden balcony railing with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow wooden corridor with warm ambient lighting from wall lanterns. The camera approaches a distinctive large round door with stained glass panels and metal scrollwork, then opens it to transition into the bedroom space.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory bedroom with multiple four-poster beds

events.description: entering the spacious circular bedroom through the stone archway
noticing a figure in dark robes standing near the ornate mirror

agents.ego_description: moving through the bedroom, panning around to observe the multiple beds, furniture, and decorative elements arranged in the circular room

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes standing still near the large ornate mirror

entered.detail: wooden bed with red bedding and white pillows, carved posts
large decorative mirror with elaborate carved wooden frame
tall red wooden cabinet with carved floral details
hanging ceiling light fixture with multiple lamps
large circular patterned rug covering the stone floor
tall floor lamp with glowing glass shade

segments.scene_description: Inside a spacious circular bedroom with multiple four-poster beds arranged around the perimeter. The room features warm lighting from standing lamps and a ceiling chandelier, with a large ornate mirror on the left wall where a figure in dark robes stands. The camera pans around to reveal wooden wardrobes, dressers, and decorative wall tapestries.

events.description: exiting the bedroom back into the corridor through the round doorway
turning right to follow the corridor toward a new section

agents.ego_description: leaving the bedroom through the round doorway and walking along the wooden corridor with decorative railings

entered.detail: textured stone wall section with wooden trim
green potted plant in decorative container
stone archway leading to another corridor section

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bedroom back into the narrow corridor, leaving the round door behind. The corridor features wooden floors, stone wall sections, and decorative railings. The camera moves past potted plants and approaches a stone archway leading to a different section of the common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated corridor with topiary and stone archways

events.description: entering the elevated corridor section with stone walls and potted plants
ascending the wooden ramp leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking up a wooden ramp lined with potted topiary plants and passing under stone archways

entered.detail: large stone arch with wooden support beams and carvings
decorative potted tree with shaped foliage in ornate planter
sloped wooden walkway with patterned carpet leading upward
stone wall with hanging green vines and plants
suspended lantern providing warm ambient light

segments.scene_description: Moving into a different corridor section featuring stone architecture and abundant potted plants. The space has an elevated wooden ramp leading upward, flanked by decorative railings and large stone archways. Topiary plants in ornate containers line the walkway as the camera ascends the ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cozy wooden corridor through a circular dormitory and back into an expanding stone hallway. It begins by moving through a narrow wooden passage lit by wall lanterns, approaching and opening a large round door adorned with stained glass and metal scrollwork. As the camera enters the spacious circular bedroom, the view pans across four-poster beds, wooden wardrobes, and a figure in dark robes standing by an ornate mirror under the glow of a ceiling chandelier. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the room and retreats into the corridor, passing potted plants and stone wall sections before gliding through a stone archway. Finally, the environment opens into a wider architectural space where the camera ascends a wooden ramp flanked by decorative railings and large topiary plants in ornate containers.
